Uses of Class
ui.Subwindow

Packages that use Subwindow
Package
Description
ui
 
ui.interaction
 

  • Uses of Subwindow in ui

    Subclasses of Subwindow in ui
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TableDesignSubwindow
    A subwindow that provides an interface to edit the structure (columns) of a table.
    class 
    TableRowsSubwindow
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of rows in a table.
    class 
    TableSubwindow
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of tables in a TableRepository.
    Methods in ui that return Subwindow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Subwindow
    SubwindowManager.findSubwindowAt(int x, int y)
    Finds the topmost subwindow at a given screen coordinate.
    Methods in ui with parameters of type Subwindow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SubwindowManager.bringToFront(Subwindow subwindow)
    Moves a subwindow to the front (end of the list).
    void
    SubwindowManager.closeSubwindow(Subwindow w)
    Removes the given subwindow from the list of managed subwindows.

  • Uses of Subwindow in ui.interaction

    Methods in ui.interaction with parameters of type Subwindow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MouseInteractionDispatcher.dispatchMouseEvent(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow target, int id, int x, int y, int clicks)
    Delegates the mouse event to the first strategy that wants to handle it.
    void
    CloseButtonStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow w, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Handles the mouse click to close the window.
    void
    DragStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Handles dragging behavior for a Subwindow.
    void
    EditAnySubwindowStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
     
    void
    MouseInteractionStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
     
    void
    OpenTableStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Handles the mouse event to open a new TableDesignSubwindow if the user double-clicked a valid table row.
    void
    ResizeStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Handles the mouse event for resizing a subwindow.
    void
    ScrollInteractionStrategy.handle(SubwindowManager manager, Subwindow window, int id, int x, int y, int clickCount)
     
    boolean
    CloseButtonStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow w, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the event.
    boolean
    DragStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow window, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Determines whether this strategy should handle the given mouse event.
    boolean
    EditAnySubwindowStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow window, int x, int y, int clickCount)
     
    boolean
    MouseInteractionStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow window, int x, int y, int clickCount)
     
    boolean
    OpenTableStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow window, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the given mouse interaction.
    boolean
    ResizeStrategy.wantsToHandle(Subwindow w, int x, int y, int clickCount)
    Determines whether this strategy wants to handle the mouse interaction at the specified coordinates.
    boolean
